allow: Bash(node -e "const c=require\('@toss/tds-colors'\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(c\)\); console.log\('colors keys sample:', c.colors? Object.keys\(c.colors\).slice\(0,60\): 'no colors'\); console.log\('adaptive?', !!c.adaptive\);")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:',d.get\('main'\)\); print\('module:',d.get\('module'\)\); print\('types:',d.get\('types'\)\); print\('exports keys:', list\(d.get\('exports',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")
